note: Curated contract list. Rolling daily contracts (bitcoin, oil, NYC/Miami temp) are managed separately by rolling_contracts.py.

prediction_frequencies.once_daily: Run once each morning (rolling daily, gas prices)
prediction_frequencies.once_weekly: Run once per week (Survivor, weekly rolling)

contracts.question: US-Iran nuclear deal before 2027?
contracts.resolution_rules: Resolves YES if the US and Iran reach a formal nuclear agreement (JCPOA revival or new deal) before 2027. Must be an official agreement, not just talks or frameworks.
contracts.key_actors: US State Dept, Iran Foreign Ministry, IAEA, EU (E3 mediators)

contracts.question: US-Iran nuclear deal by April 30?
contracts.resolution_rules: Resolves YES if a formal US-Iran nuclear agreement is reached by April 30, 2026. Same criteria as the 2027 version but shorter deadline.
contracts.key_actors: US State Dept, Iran Foreign Ministry, IAEA, EU (E3 mediators)

contracts.contract_name: Strait of Hormuz traffic normalizes by April 30
contracts.question: Strait of Hormuz traffic returns to normal by end of April?
contracts.resolution_rules: Resolves YES if commercial shipping traffic through the Strait of Hormuz returns to pre-disruption levels by April 30, 2026. Based on shipping data and maritime intelligence reports.
contracts.key_actors: Iran Navy, IRGC, US CENTCOM, shipping companies, maritime intelligence firms

Will Iran close the Strait of Hormuz by March 31?
Will Iran close the Strait of Hormuz by June 30?

contracts.resolution_rules: Resolves based on whether Iran takes action to block or significantly disrupt commercial shipping through the Strait of Hormuz before 2027.
contracts.key_actors: Iran government, IRGC Navy, US military, oil tanker operators, Gulf states

contracts.question: H.R. 22 (SAVE Act) signed into law in 2026?
contracts.resolution_rules: Resolves YES if the Safeguard American Voter Eligibility (SAVE) Act is signed into law by the President in 2026. Must pass both House and Senate and receive presidential signature.
contracts.key_actors: US House, US Senate, President, House Speaker

contracts.question: US recession by end of 2026?
contracts.resolution_rules: Resolves YES if the NBER Business Cycle Dating Committee declares a US recession that includes any part of 2026, OR if two consecutive quarters of negative real GDP growth occur with at least one quarter in 2026.
contracts.key_actors: NBER Business Cycle Dating Committee, BEA, Federal Reserve

contracts.question: Fed decision in April?

outcomes.question: Will the Fed decrease interest rates by 50+ bps after the April 2026 meeting?
Will the Fed decrease interest rates by 25 bps after the April 2026 meeting?
Will there be no change in Fed interest rates after the April 2026 meeting?
Will the Fed increase interest rates by 25+ bps after the April 2026 meeting?

contracts.resolution_rules: Resolves based on the FOMC decision announced after the April 29-30, 2026 meeting. Options: rate cut (25bps or 50+bps), no change, or rate hike. Based on the official FOMC statement.
contracts.key_actors: FOMC, Jerome Powell, Federal Reserve Board governors

contracts.key_actors: Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS)

contracts.question: Jerome Powell out as Fed Chair by...?

outcomes.question: Jerome Powell out as Fed Chair by May 14, 2026?
Jerome Powell out as Fed Chair by March 31, 2026?

contracts.resolution_rules: Resolves based on the date Jerome Powell ceases to serve as Federal Reserve Chair. Includes resignation, removal, or term expiration. His current term as Chair expires May 2026.
